programmes.show_description: When Mannering discovers that his Paris shop is being used as a front for drug trafficking, he must team up with local police to break up the gang responsible.
Can a palm print on the roof of a car reveal the identity of an elusive agent called, The Fox? However, retrieving the car and the print proves to be more difficult than expected.
